app.title: Ruyi Workbench
navigation.switchTheme: Switch between dark and light themes
session.empty: No chats yet. Select New chat to begin.
workspace.name: Workspace
workspace.pathPlaceholder: Enter an absolute path, for example C:\Users\me\project
workspace.pathAbsoluteRequired: Enter a complete absolute path, for example C:\Users\me\project
onboarding.drop.title: Drop a folder here, or select one
onboarding.drop.description: Choose a folder as the AI workspace. It can access only the files in that folder.
chat.placeholder: Type a message or describe what you want to accomplish…
chat.waitCurrentTurn: Wait for the current turn to finish first
chat.resume.title: Your previous task is unfinished
chat.resume.prompt: Please continue the previous unfinished task.
permission.title: Safety and permissions
permission.revokeAll.confirm: Revoke all grants for this chat? A call already in progress is not affected; future calls will ask again.
permission.execution.required: Add at least one allowed command prefix for an execution grant
permission.request.title: Tool permission request · {{engine}}
permission.revertible: ✓ This action can be reverted with one click
permission.notRevertible: ⚠ This action cannot be reverted automatically. Review before continuing.
permission.allowSession: Auto-allow this tool for this chat
mission.complete.title: Task complete
mission.complete.description: All milestones are complete. Automatic progress has stopped.
mission.stuck.title: Task is stuck
mission.stuck.description: There has been no progress for several turns. The task is paused for your direction.
mission.budgetPaused.title: Automatic progress paused
mission.budgetPaused.description: The automatic-progress budget is exhausted. Progress is saved and waiting for your direction.
plan.card.heading: {{engine}} proposed an execution plan for your approval
plan.expired: This plan is no longer available
plan.awaitingApproval: AI is waiting for your plan approval
changes.title: Changes in this turn
changes.empty: No files were changed in this turn
changes.revert.confirm: Revert changes to “{{path}}”? The previous content will be restored and this cannot be undone.
changes.revertTurn.confirm: Revert the entire turn? All revertible files from this turn will be restored and this cannot be undone.
changes.commandNotRevertible: Commands and terminal operations cannot be reverted automatically
file.tree.mention.title: @ mention: insert the relative path into the message box
file.preview.truncated: (Previewing only the first {{size}}; content was truncated)
file.preview.imageTooLarge: The image exceeds 5 MB ({{size}}). Select Open to view it.
file.preview.htmlIsolated: HTML is rendered in an isolated sandbox: scripts, network, and forms are disabled.
file.preview.binary: Binary or document file ({{format}}). Select Open to view it with a system app.
error.generic.title: Something went wrong
error.generic.description: The operation could not be completed. Review the details and try again.
error.api.authToken: The workbench session token is missing or invalid
error.api.routeNotFound: The requested API route was not found
error.api.internalError: The service encountered an internal error.
error.api.methodNotAllowed: This request method is not supported.
error.api.hostRejected: The request origin is not allowed.
error.api.checkpointNotFound: The requested change record was not found
error.api.pathNotAbsolute: The file path must be absolute
error.api.agentRunRequired: Provide both the chat and workflow-run identifiers
error.api.questionNotPending: This question has ended or was already answered
error.api.questionDeliveryFailed: The selection was not delivered; try again
error.providerMisconfigured: The model endpoint is not configured or unavailable
error.providerMisconfigured.next: Open Settings → Model providers and check the URL and API key
error.networkDown.next: Try again when online, or use a task that can be completed offline
error.permissionDenied: Permission was denied for this operation
error.permissionDenied.next: Allow it in the prompt, or adjust the mode in Safety and permissions
error.idleTimeout: The turn was stopped after being idle for too long
error.toolLoop: Repeated tool calls were detected, so this turn was stopped
error.cliMissing.title: Claude CLI was not found
error.cliMissing.description: We recommend configuring an API engine. You can get started without installing Claude CLI.
settings.title: Settings
usage.title: Usage and cost
usage.unavailable: Usage data is temporarily unavailable. Try refreshing in a moment.
usage.empty: No usage records yet. Start a chat to see a cost summary here.
usage.opsInterventions: {{count}} manual interventions in the last {{days}} days
usage.budget.over: This month: about {{spent}} / budget {{budget}}, over by about {{over}} (estimate)
usage.cost.unavailable: No cost estimate (unit prices are not configured, or usage is subscription-billed)
usage.note.cost: Cost is an equivalent estimate based on usage, not an actual charge.
usage.note.planTurns: About {{count}} turns are subscription-billed; their tokens are not included in the cost above.
usage.note.planUsage: Some usage is subscription-billed; only tokens are shown and not included in the cost above.
usage.planIncluded.title: Subscription plan: billed monthly; tokens do not incur separate charges.
usage.dailyTrend.summary: Daily token trend across {{count}} days; peak about {{tokens}} ({{date}}).
workflow.title: Agent workflows
workflow.run.title: Agent workflow · {{count}} nodes
workflow.run.description: The dependency graph is saved. Nodes unlock automatically as dependencies complete.
workflow.quickRun.title: Run template: {{title}}
workflow.quickRun.description: You are about to run “{{title}}”. Add the specific task or topic for this run; every node expands from it. Leaving it blank runs the template text as-is, which is usually not meaningful.
workflow.quickRun.contextPlaceholder: For example: evaluate whether to split the order service from a monolith into microservices
workflow.editor.title: Workflow graph editor
workflow.editor.name: Name
workflow.editor.defaultTask: Describe the task this node should complete
workflow.editor.copyCreated: Switched to a new template copy. Saving will not overwrite the original.
workflow.editor.loaded: Loaded the template. Saving overwrites the same personal or project ID; built-in templates save as personal copies.
workflow.editor.connectHint: Connect mode: select a target node to create a dependency arrow from the current node.
workflow.editor.blankCreated: Created a blank template. Saving will create a new template.
workflow.editor.delete.confirm: Delete workflow template “{{title}}”? This cannot be undone.
workflow.editor.delete.none: There is no saved personal or project copy of this template to delete
workflow.empty: This chat has no Agent workflows yet.
workflow.stall.persistence: Progress persistence is failing. The current progress may not be recoverable; check disk space or antivirus locks.
workflow.stall.idle: Possible stall: the workflow made no progress for too long and was stopped.
workflow.stall.waiting: Possible stall: {{count}} nodes are waiting for resources.
workflow.pool.title: Shared task pool
workflow.pool.cost: Estimated cost: 1 new node, at most about {{maxIters}} calls
workflow.retry.cascadeAria: Retry node {{nodeId}} and its downstream nodes
agent.title: Agents
audit.title: Audit timeline
audit.desktopUnavailable: Desktop-operation audit requires the ai-computer-control bridge
